name_en: 【Burberry】Structured Tote Bag, made from Italian tanned grained leather, featuring a striking glossy Thomas Burberry exclusive logo. Exquisitely designed with multiple pockets, including a leather-wrapped mirror charm. Can be carried by hand or with a removable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 27 x 11 x 20 cm Style No.: 8050
